block_01: Brexit has seen some important ups and downs lately. One of the most recent setbacks to Theresa May’s plan was the historic defeat by the parliament (house of Commons) of her Brexit plan. The defeat has seen the Pound tumble against the U.S. Dollar.
block_02: More recent developments suggest that the House of Commons are trying to delay the Brexit date or even steer Brexit dilemma to public voting again! These positive announcements have seen the Pound reversing previous losses and strengthening against the Dollar.
block_03: The markets perceive the House of Commons efforts as crucial in reducing the probability of a No Deal Brexit. Moreover a No Deal Brexit could have catastrophic effects into the UK’s economy.
